science.title: Dharti ka Ghumav
science.content: Dharti apni dhuri par 24 ghante mein ek chakkar lagati hai, jisse din aur raat hoti hai. Aur suraj ke chakkar mein 365 din lagate hain.

science.title: Prakash ki Gati
science.content: Prakash ki gati 3 lakh km per second hai. Suraj ki roshni dharti tak pahunchne mein 8 minute 20 second lagta hai.

science.title: DNA
science.content: DNA ek molecule hai jo har jeev ki genetic information rakhta hai. Insaan ka DNA 99.9% ek jaisa hota hai.

technology.title: Artificial Intelligence
technology.content: AI machines ko insaan jaisa sochne ki kshamta deta hai. Machine Learning, Deep Learning, aur Neural Networks iske andar aate hain.

technology.title: Internet ka Itihaas
technology.content: Internet 1969 mein ARPANET ke roop mein shuru hua tha. Aaj 5 billion se zyada log internet use karte hain.

technology.title: Android OS
technology.content: Android ko Andy Rubin ne banaya tha aur 2005 mein Google ne khareed liya. Aaj duniya ke 72% smartphones Android pe chalte hain.

technology.title: Quantum Computing
technology.content: Quantum computers qubits use karte hain jo 0 aur 1 dono ek saath ho sakte hain. Ye normal computers se lakho guna fast hain kuch kaamon mein.

history.title: Bharat ki Azaadi
history.content: Bharat ko 15 August 1947 ko British raj se azaadi mili. Mahatma Gandhi, Nehru, Subhash Chandra Bose jaise netaon ne swatantrata sangram mein yogdaan diya.

history.title: Mughal Samrajya
history.content: Mughal samrajya 1526 mein Babur ne sthaapit kiya tha. Akbar, Shah Jahan, aur Aurangzeb iske pramukh samrat the.

history.title: World War 2
history.content: Dusra Vishwa Yuddh 1939-1945 tak chala. Isme 70 million se zyada log mare. Allied Powers ne Axis Powers ko haraya.

space.title: Chandrayaan-3
space.content: ISRO ka Chandrayaan-3 mission August 2023 mein Chand ke South Pole par safaltapurvak land hua. Bharat yeh karne wala chautha desh bana.

space.title: Mars Mission
space.content: ISRO ka Mars Orbiter Mission (Mangalyaan) 2014 mein launch hua. Bharat pehle hi prayaas mein Mars orbit pahunchne wala pehla desh bana.

space.title: Black Hole
space.content: Black hole ek aisi jagah hai jahan gravity itni strong hai ki roshni bhi nahi nikal sakti. Sabse nezdiki black hole 1,560 prakash varsh door hai.

health.title: Paani Peena
health.content: Roz kam se kam 8 glass paani peena chahiye. Paani body ke toxins bahar nikalta hai aur skin ko healthy rakhta hai.

health.title: Neend ki Zaroorat
health.content: Adults ko roz 7-9 ghante ki neend zaruri hai. Kam neend se memory, immunity aur mental health par asar padta hai.

health.title: Meditation
health.content: Roz 10 minute meditation karne se stress kam hota hai, focus badhta hai aur emotional health improve hoti hai.

india.title: Bharat ki Jansankhya
india.content: Bharat 2023 mein duniya ka sabse zyada jansankhya wala desh ban gaya, China se aage. 1.4 billion se zyada log hain.

india.title: Indian Economy
india.content: Bharat duniya ki 5th largest economy hai. IT, pharmaceuticals, aur agriculture pradhan kshetra hain.

india.title: Indian Constitution
india.content: Bharat ka samvidhan duniya ka sabse lamba likha hua samvidhan hai. Dr. B.R. Ambedkar isko banane mein mukhya the. 26 January 1950 ko laagu hua.
